title: Possible fake maritime recruitment scam page
indicator: Facebook recruitment post requesting personal details
summary: Unverified OSINT report of a possible fake recruitment post targeting maritime workers. The post may be collecting personal details from job seekers.
recommended_action: Preserve screenshots, verify the page history and admin country visibility, check for payment requests, and avoid public attribution until verified.
